text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off from training, I glance over at the
track only to find...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Wheeze... I-I can't do more than this...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...No, I need to work harder. If I want to win this
race, I have to!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You can do this, Rice! Believe in yourself! All
right, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait... Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I-I can't run any further...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I suppose I should stop.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, you can't!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: McQueen, follow... follow my lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've worked hard for so, so long because I really
want to win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My goal gives me the strength to go on—a
strength I never thought I had.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm able to push myself so hard that I surprise
even myself, so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Think of me as the finish line... and run! Don't give
up. Give it all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-no... That's not the issue here...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, to be frank... I suppose you could say that
my weight has seen fluctuation as of late...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was merely thinking of giving up on sugar to put
a stop to it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait... WHAT?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the confusion. And please keep
what I told you to yourself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, your inspirational speech has opened
my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's like you say—a meaningful goal will draw
strength out of you that you never thought you
had.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll summon up the very last of my power reserves
for my sugary treats! Let's run together, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay... Sure! I'll do my best for your goal!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Keep up with me, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, I think I've lost some of the wind out of my
sails.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall become your goal! Now, you follow
my lead!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hweh... Just keep following, just keep following!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having a goal pushes you to give it your all. It's
very important to have goals in all aspects of
one's life.
